docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,900.00 FILED BY JOHNSON, RAMONA AS TO DEFENDANT MACKIEWICZ, FIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-30-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
